name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: ODFL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $230.2081. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $230.2081, stop $196.7211, target $233.4940. Risk/reward is 0.10:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
